data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: ADR 0003 created at plugins/dso/docs/adr/0003-intent-aware-bug-classification-gates.md. Now evaluating whether /docs/reference/ Living Documents exist — they don't (no /docs/ directory). Architectural gate requires overwriting relevant Living Document; will create domain-logic.md for fix-bug gate architecture as the closest equivalent. Also preparing CLAUDE.md suggested-change report.
